risk_highlights.loss_history_summary: Over the 5-year period (2020-2024), the insured reported a total of 48 claims. Claim counts by year: 2020: 6, 2021: 15, 2022: 4, 2023: 10, 2024: 13. Total premiums paid over 5 years: $7,549,116.32. One cancellation occurred in 2022 (Zurich Insurance Group). Loss ratios were not provided for any policy year.

extracted_text_sections.claims_narrative: 48 total claims reported over 5 years (2020-2024). Peak claim year was 2021 with 15 claims. Lowest claim year was 2022 with 4 claims, coinciding with a policy cancellation by Zurich Insurance Group. No loss ratios were provided.
